title: Elmhurst Greenmarket
description: On a bustling commercial street outside of NYC Health + Hospitals/Elmhurst, the Elmhurst Hospital Greenmarket has connected local farms and farmers to this Elmhurst neighborhood since 2010. Every Tuesday, throughout the season, residents and hospital employees and visitors can find a diverse selection of locally-grown and produced foods throughout the market. Beyond shopping, visitors can […]

title: Creative Aging: Café and Creativity
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Join us at the Jackson Heights library for a relaxing cup of coffee or tea, fun crafts and activities, and conversation with friends old and new. We will meet on the 2nd Tuesday of each month. Some of the activities include – Café – Coffee and Tea “The Artist’s Way” Practice Brain Puzzles and Games […]

title: Art Class (Adults)
description: The Jackson Heights Art Club offers several weekly adult classes in watercolor, oil, acrylic, pastel and drawing. Each student receives individual guidance and assistance from our professional instructors at the Club’s Studio. One may register or learn more about the classes by calling (718) 426-9821, and the club’s website is jacksonheightsartclub.org.

title: ESL Conversation Club
description: Come learn & practice English using everyday real world scenarios. All >levels. 4pm Basic Lesson 5pm Conversation Free & Open to all Run by 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition

title: Paella Nights @ Addictive Wine and Tapas Bar
description: Our Paella de Mariscos is a signature of coastal Spain. Meticulously made to order with the precision that defines Spanish culinary artistry. Succulent shrimp, tender calamari, mussels, and vegetables are gently simmered in saffron infused rice, enriched with piquillo peppers, and a whisper of Fino sherry. Each grain absorbs centuries of tradition. This is paella […]

title: Dungeons & Dragons @ The Queensboro
description: Visit the Queensboro restaurant for a fun Tuesday night of D&D with fellow adventurers! Your Tuesday Night, Upgraded. Looking for something better than another forgettable night out? Join us at The Queensboro for a live, in-person Dungeons & Dragons experience—played in a bar, guided by professional Dungeon Masters, and built for both first-timers and veterans. […]

title: AFROINDI | Poetic & Musical Performance | Afro-Peruvian & Indigenous Soundscapes
description: A powerful poetic and musical encounter where Afro-Peruvian voices meet Indigenous traditions from across Latin America, weaving rhythm, memory, and ancestral sound into a layered, transnational experience that bridges diaspora, identity, and living cultural expression.
